<style>
	#notify-bar .alert-wrapper{
		padding:5px;
	}
	#close{
		float: right;
		padding-right: 40px;
	}
	#close:hover {
		cursor: pointer;
	}
	#notify-bar .icon-wrap{
		height: 25px;
		display: inline-flex;
		width: 20px;
		margin: 5px 20px 0 0;
	}
	.notificationParagraph{
		margin-top: 16px;
		margin-bottom: 16px;
	}
	.notificationParagraph a {
		color: white;
		text-decoration: underline;
	}
	.notificationParagraph a:hover {
		color: white;
		text-decoration: underline;
	}
	.notificationParagraph a:active {
		color: white;
		text-decoration: underline;
	}
	.notificationParagraph a:focus {
		color: white;
		text-decoration: underline;
	}
	#notify-bar .notification-title{
		display: inline-flex;
		color: white;
		vertical-align: top;
		margin-top: 5px;
	}
	#notify-bar .icon-wrap svg{
		width: inherit;
		height: inherit;
		fill: white;
		padding-top:5px;
	}
	#notify-bar{
		text-align: center;
		background: #34566B;
		color: white;
	}
	@media only screen and (max-width: 600px) {
			#notify-bar .icon-wrap{
				float:left;
				margin: 15px 20px 0 15px;
			}
			#notify-bar .notification-title{
				display: block;
				margin-top: 5px;
				left: 50px;
				top: -30px;
				margin-right: 30px;
			}
	}

</style>

<h1 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-left has-white-color has-text-color" id="h-recovery-begins-with-a-promise">Recovery Begins with a Promise</h1>



<p class="has-text-align-left has-white-color has-text-color">Start your life in recovery with compassionate, effective treatment at Promises Behavioral Health</p>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-horizontal is-content-justification-left is-layout-flex wp-container-core-buttons-is-layout-20be11b6 wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">

</div>
</div></div>



<section class="wp-block-uagb-columns uagb-columns__wrap uagb-columns__background-color uagb-columns__stack-mobile uagb-columns__valign- uagb-columns__gap-10 alignfull uagb-block-86ce0382 uagb-columns__columns-1 uagb-columns__max_width-theme"><div class="uagb-columns__overlay"></div><div class="uagb-columns__inner-wrap uagb-columns__columns-1">

<section class="wp-block-uagb-columns uagb-columns__wrap uagb-columns__background-none uagb-columns__stack-mobile uagb-columns__valign- uagb-columns__gap-10 align uagb-block-49de3545 uagb-columns__columns-2 uagb-columns__max_width-theme"><div class="uagb-columns__overlay"></div><div class="uagb-columns__inner-wrap uagb-columns__columns-2">

<p>Addiction treatment means making big changes in your life. But you don’t have to make those changes all alone.</p>



<p>Promises Behavioral Health treatment centers provide comprehensive, effective treatment services that support you throughout your entire path to recovery:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong><em>Addiction treatment that works. </em></strong>Our model for treatment is based on the most current evidence-based practices for substance use treatment and co-occurring diagnoses</li>



<li><strong><em>Support for doing the work of recovery.</em> </strong>Patients have the opportunity to start recovery and healing in safe, judgment-free environments where they are supported by industry-leading professionals and empathetic staff</li>
</ul>
</div>

<p>Our intake process is based on our client-first philosophy. From your very first phone call with us, we’re here to help you break down the barriers to treatment.</p>

<ul class="wp-block-list">

<li>Quick access to treatment, allowing you to start treatment without unnecessary delays or frustrations</li>
</ul>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="h-recovery-is-lifelong-and-so-is-our-commitment-to-yours">Recovery is lifelong—and so is our commitment to yours.</h2>



<p>We offer a lifelong support system for individuals wherever they’re at in their recovery.</p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading"><a href="/rehab-admissions-process/" data-wpel-link="internal">Starting and during treatment</a></h3>



<p>At Promises Behavioral Health, we support patients even before they join us. Our entire admissions process is designed to get to know you as a person and to reduce the feeling of being overwhelmed. </p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading"><a href="/addiction-treatment-center-programs/alumni-program/" data-wpel-link="internal">Aftercare and alumni groups</a></h3>



<p class="has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color">Our extensive aftercare and alumni groups network connects you with others living in sobriety with alumni events, Facebook groups, and other forms of support to keep you focused on long-term recovery.</p>
</div>
</div></section>

				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

Recovery Begins with a Promise

Start your life in recovery with compassionate, effective treatment at Promises Behavioral Health

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

 Verify your insurance 

There is a better future in front of you—and we’re here to help you discover it.

We help patients recover their lives after substance use disorder at our nationwide family of treatment centers.

 Promises Behavioral Health is fully accredited and certified 

 

 

 

 

About Promises Behavioral Health

With its headquarters in Brentwood TN, Promises Behavioral Health is a family of centers nationwide ready to help you achieve recovery. Our highly trained staff throughout our drug rehab centers work to fill in the gaps of treatment. By providing unique options in healing environments, Promises Behavioral Health addiction treatment changes the way we approach recovery. Whether you’re looking for treatment for yourself or for a loved one, our team is ready to help every step of the way.

 learn more about us 

 

It doesn’t matter what’s happened up to this point: there is a path to recovery for you

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

Addiction treatment means making big changes in your life. But you don’t have to make those changes all alone.

Promises Behavioral Health treatment centers provide comprehensive, effective treatment services that support you throughout your entire path to recovery:

 

 Addiction treatment that works. Our model for treatment is based on the most current evidence-based practices for substance use treatment and co-occurring diagnoses

 Support for doing the work of recovery. Patients have the opportunity to start recovery and healing in safe, judgment-free environments where they are supported by industry-leading professionals and empathetic staff

 

 

An approach to recovery that’s rooted in compassion and hope

Your story is important. Your recovery is important. This is the foundation of our relationship with our clients. 

We care about your challenges and helping you overcome them.

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

 

Our intake process is based on our client-first philosophy. From your very first phone call with us, we’re here to help you break down the barriers to treatment.

Start your recovery with:

 

A compassionate, nonjudgmental intake process to determine the right treatment schedule for you

A no-hassle insurance coverage verification process

Quick access to treatment, allowing you to start treatment without unnecessary delays or frustrations

 

Recovery is too precious to risk with unproven methods or anything less than best-in-class professionals.

Our experienced professionals are trained in current, evidence-based therapeutic methods:

 

Trauma-informed care 

Dual diagnosis treatment 

Recovery and relapse prevention

Nutrition education

Medication-assisted treatment

 

 

The addiction help you need is ready for you

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

 Medical detox 

Medical detox provides 24-hour medical monitoring for patients withdrawing from drug and alcohol use. 

We focus on ensuring your safety and comfort until you’re mentally stabilized and ready to participate in treatment.

 Residential treatment 

Now is your opportunity to dedicate your whole self towards healing. 

Promises Behavioral Health offers modern facilities with all the amenities you need to feel at home while you do the hard work of your recovery.

 Outpatient treatment 

A flexible approach to treating your drug and alcohol addiction. With our outpatient programs, you don’t have to interrupt your life to get your life back. 

Options include partial hospitalization programs, intensive outpatient programs, and continuing care groups.

 Alumni support 

Once you’ve completed your treatment program, we support you through our extensive network of alumni groups. 

Our alumni groups reinforce recovery skills, provide social and emotional support, and help advocate for addiction awareness.

Mental Health & Addiction Treatment Programs

at Promises Behavioral Health

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

 Personality Disorder 

With a residential treatment center for dependent personality disorder, many people with personality disorders can manage their symptoms.

 Anxiety Treatment 

 Our inpatient anxiety treatment centers help people overcome the effects of anxiety disorders. 

 Trauma & PTSD Treatment 

 Residential PTSD programs offer a private, secluded place where the emphasis is on treatment. 

 Non 12 Step Programs 

 Non 12 step options offer effective treatment for those who feel a 12 step approach isn’t for them. 

 Mood Disorders 

 Sex Addiction Treatment 

 Individualized treatment for sex addiction is crucial to helping clients stay safe and healthy. 

Most major insurance providers help cover the cost of treatment

Find out right now if your health insurance benefits can be used to cover substance use treatment at Promises Behavioral Health treatment centers.

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

Comprehensive, evidence-based addiction treatment centers with locations nationwide

Our effective, client-centered treatment is available no matter where you live. Our treatment centers across the country deliver specialized programs to help you achieve lifelong sobriety.

Promises Behavioral Health

Mental Health Treatment & Drug Rehab Centers

Our various locations throughout the country provide essential mental health and addiction treatment to fit the needs of each client. Promise Behavioral Health offers unique yet effective experiences for those undergoing mental health or addiction treatment. Each location is fully accredited and staffed with a knowledgeable, trained, and compassionate staff.

 see our locations 

 

 The Ranch TN 

 Nunnelly, Tennessee 

 The Ranch PA 

 Wrightsville, Pennsylvania 

 Promises Brazos Valley 

 College Station, Texas 

 The Right Step Houston 

 Houston, Texas 

 Washburn House 

 Worcester, Massachusetts 

 Promises Dallas 

Dallas, Texas

 Promises Atlanta 

 Atlanta, Georgia 

 View all Treatment Centers 

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

I need help with substance use for:

 Myself 

Asking for help is a huge accomplishment. We’re here to support individuals through all stages of their recovery from drug and alcohol addiction.

 A loved one 

Seeing a loved one struggle with the effects of addiction is painful, but you can help them by helping them access effective, compassionate treatment.

 A client 

You care deeply about helping your clients get the help they deserve. We offer evidence-based substance use disorder treatments and are committed to open, transparent communication with referring professionals.

Recovery is lifelong—and so is our commitment to yours.

We offer a lifelong support system for individuals wherever they’re at in their recovery.

 Starting and during treatment 

At Promises Behavioral Health, we support patients even before they join us. Our entire admissions process is designed to get to know you as a person and to reduce the feeling of being overwhelmed. 

 Aftercare and alumni groups 

Our extensive aftercare and alumni groups network connects you with others living in sobriety with alumni events, Facebook groups, and other forms of support to keep you focused on long-term recovery.

 

 The greatest form of courage is to ask for help 

No matter where you’re at on your journey to recovery, we’re here to help you. 

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

Social

 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 Open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week 

103 Powell Court

Suite 100

Brentwood, TN 37027

 888.483.7451

<p class="has-text-align-left has-white-color has-text-color">Start your life in recovery with compassionate, effective treatment at Promises Behavioral Health</p>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color" id="h-there-is-a-better-future-in-front-of-you-and-we-re-here-to-help-you-discover-it">There is a better future in front of you—and we’re here to help you discover it.</h2>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color">We help patients recover their lives after substance use disorder at our nationwide family of treatment centers.</p>

<div class="wp-block-uagb-advanced-heading uagb-block-93819499"><h2 class="uagb-heading-text">About Promises Behavioral Health</h2><div class="uagb-separator"></div><p class="uagb-desc-text">With its headquarters in Brentwood TN, Promises Behavioral Health is a family of centers nationwide ready to help you achieve recovery. Our highly trained staff throughout our drug rehab centers work to fill in the gaps of treatment. By providing unique options in healing environments, Promises Behavioral Health addiction treatment changes the way we approach recovery. Whether you’re looking for treatment for yourself or for a loved one, our team is ready to help every step of the way.</p></div>

<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-4bc16e6f"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color" id="h-it-doesn-t-matter-what-s-happened-up-to-this-point-there-is-a-path-to-recovery-for-you">It doesn’t matter what’s happened up to this point: there is a path to recovery for you</h2>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-horizontal is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-buttons-is-layout-03627597 wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-button"><a class="wp-block-button__link has-background wp-element-button" href="tel:(888) 483-7451" style="background-color:#419b05" data-wpel-link="internal">Call our 24/7 hotline</a></div>
</div>
</div>
</div></section>



<section class="wp-block-uagb-columns uagb-columns__wrap uagb-columns__background-none uagb-columns__stack-mobile uagb-columns__valign- uagb-columns__gap-10 align uagb-block-49de3545 uagb-columns__columns-2 uagb-columns__max_width-theme"><div class="uagb-columns__overlay"></div><div class="uagb-columns__inner-wrap uagb-columns__columns-2">
<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-cc8853a3"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<p>Addiction treatment means making big changes in your life. But you don’t have to make those changes all alone.</p>



<p>Promises Behavioral Health treatment centers provide comprehensive, effective treatment services that support you throughout your entire path to recovery:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong><em>Addiction treatment that works. </em></strong>Our model for treatment is based on the most current evidence-based practices for substance use treatment and co-occurring diagnoses</li>



<li><strong><em>Support for doing the work of recovery.</em> </strong>Patients have the opportunity to start recovery and healing in safe, judgment-free environments where they are supported by industry-leading professionals and empathetic staff</li>
</ul>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-428d43da"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<figure class="wp-block-image aligncenter size-full"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="430" height="376" src="https://www.promisesbehavioralhealth.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/how-does-psychodynamic-therapy-work-2.jpg" alt="how-does-psychodynamic-therapy-work" class="wp-image-7321" srcset="https://www.promises.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/how-does-psychodynamic-therapy-work-2.jpg 430w, https://www.promises.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/how-does-psychodynamic-therapy-work-2-300x262.jpg 300w" sizes="(max-width: 430px) 100vw, 430px" /></figure>
</div>
</div></section>



<div style="height:30px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>

<div class="wp-block-uagb-advanced-heading uagb-block-ad61ec01"><h2 class="uagb-heading-text"><a href="https://www.promises.com/rehab-admissions-process/addiction-treatment-for-yourself/" data-wpel-link="internal">Myself</a></h2><div class="uagb-separator"></div><p class="uagb-desc-text">Asking for help is a huge accomplishment. We’re here to support individuals through all stages of their recovery from drug and alcohol addiction.</p></div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-443a73d0"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<div class="wp-block-uagb-advanced-heading uagb-block-b03445b1"><h2 class="uagb-heading-text"><a href="https://www.promises.com/rehab-admissions-process/addiction-treatment-for-a-loved-one/" data-wpel-link="internal">A loved one</a></h2><div class="uagb-separator"></div><p class="uagb-desc-text">Seeing a loved one struggle with the effects of addiction is painful, but you can help them by helping them access effective, compassionate treatment.</p></div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-c66cf722"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<div class="wp-block-uagb-advanced-heading uagb-block-254baed9"><h2 class="uagb-heading-text"><a href="https://pbhstagingweb.wpengine.com/rehab-admissions-process/addiction-treatment-for-a-client/" target="_blank" rel="noopener follow external noreferrer" data-wpel-link="external">A client</a></h2><div class="uagb-separator"></div><p class="uagb-desc-text">You care deeply about helping your clients get the help they deserve. We offer evidence-based substance use disorder treatments and are committed to open, transparent communication with referring professionals.</p></div>
</div>
</div></section>

<section class="wp-block-uagb-columns uagb-columns__wrap uagb-columns__background-none uagb-columns__stack-mobile uagb-columns__valign- uagb-columns__gap-10 alignfull uagb-block-9d2ade98 uagb-columns__columns-1 uagb-columns__max_width-theme section-recovery"><div class="uagb-columns__overlay"></div><div class="uagb-columns__inner-wrap uagb-columns__columns-1">
<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-00a124d9"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="h-recovery-is-lifelong-and-so-is-our-commitment-to-yours">Recovery is lifelong—and so is our commitment to yours.</h2>



<p>We offer a lifelong support system for individuals wherever they’re at in their recovery.</p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading"><a href="/rehab-admissions-process/" data-wpel-link="internal">Starting and during treatment</a></h3>



<p>At Promises Behavioral Health, we support patients even before they join us. Our entire admissions process is designed to get to know you as a person and to reduce the feeling of being overwhelmed. </p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading"><a href="/addiction-treatment-center-programs/alumni-program/" data-wpel-link="internal">Aftercare and alumni groups</a></h3>



<p class="has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color">Our extensive aftercare and alumni groups network connects you with others living in sobriety with alumni events, Facebook groups, and other forms of support to keep you focused on long-term recovery.</p>
</div>
</div></section>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center has-white-color has-text-color" id="h-the-greatest-form-of-courage-is-to-ask-for-help"><em>The greatest form of courage is to ask for help</em></h2>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color">No matter where you’re at on your journey to recovery, we’re here to help you. </p>

				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

Recovery Begins with a Promise

Start your life in recovery with compassionate, effective treatment at Promises Behavioral Health

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

 Verify your insurance 

There is a better future in front of you—and we’re here to help you discover it.

We help patients recover their lives after substance use disorder at our nationwide family of treatment centers.

 Promises Behavioral Health is fully accredited and certified 

 

 

 

 

About Promises Behavioral Health

With its headquarters in Brentwood TN, Promises Behavioral Health is a family of centers nationwide ready to help you achieve recovery. Our highly trained staff throughout our drug rehab centers work to fill in the gaps of treatment. By providing unique options in healing environments, Promises Behavioral Health addiction treatment changes the way we approach recovery. Whether you’re looking for treatment for yourself or for a loved one, our team is ready to help every step of the way.

 learn more about us 

 

It doesn’t matter what’s happened up to this point: there is a path to recovery for you

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

Addiction treatment means making big changes in your life. But you don’t have to make those changes all alone.

Promises Behavioral Health treatment centers provide comprehensive, effective treatment services that support you throughout your entire path to recovery:

 

 Addiction treatment that works. Our model for treatment is based on the most current evidence-based practices for substance use treatment and co-occurring diagnoses

 Support for doing the work of recovery. Patients have the opportunity to start recovery and healing in safe, judgment-free environments where they are supported by industry-leading professionals and empathetic staff

 

 

An approach to recovery that’s rooted in compassion and hope

Your story is important. Your recovery is important. This is the foundation of our relationship with our clients. 

We care about your challenges and helping you overcome them.

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

 

Our intake process is based on our client-first philosophy. From your very first phone call with us, we’re here to help you break down the barriers to treatment.

Start your recovery with:

 

A compassionate, nonjudgmental intake process to determine the right treatment schedule for you

A no-hassle insurance coverage verification process

Quick access to treatment, allowing you to start treatment without unnecessary delays or frustrations

 

Recovery is too precious to risk with unproven methods or anything less than best-in-class professionals.

Our experienced professionals are trained in current, evidence-based therapeutic methods:

 

Trauma-informed care 

Dual diagnosis treatment 

Recovery and relapse prevention

Nutrition education

Medication-assisted treatment

 

 

The addiction help you need is ready for you

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

 Medical detox 

Medical detox provides 24-hour medical monitoring for patients withdrawing from drug and alcohol use. 

We focus on ensuring your safety and comfort until you’re mentally stabilized and ready to participate in treatment.

 Residential treatment 

Now is your opportunity to dedicate your whole self towards healing. 

Promises Behavioral Health offers modern facilities with all the amenities you need to feel at home while you do the hard work of your recovery.

 Outpatient treatment 

A flexible approach to treating your drug and alcohol addiction. With our outpatient programs, you don’t have to interrupt your life to get your life back. 

Options include partial hospitalization programs, intensive outpatient programs, and continuing care groups.

 Alumni support 

Once you’ve completed your treatment program, we support you through our extensive network of alumni groups. 

Our alumni groups reinforce recovery skills, provide social and emotional support, and help advocate for addiction awareness.

Mental Health & Addiction Treatment Programs

at Promises Behavioral Health

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

 Personality Disorder 

With a residential treatment center for dependent personality disorder, many people with personality disorders can manage their symptoms.

 Anxiety Treatment 

 Our inpatient anxiety treatment centers help people overcome the effects of anxiety disorders. 

 Trauma & PTSD Treatment 

 Residential PTSD programs offer a private, secluded place where the emphasis is on treatment. 

 Non 12 Step Programs 

 Non 12 step options offer effective treatment for those who feel a 12 step approach isn’t for them. 

 Mood Disorders 

 Sex Addiction Treatment 

 Individualized treatment for sex addiction is crucial to helping clients stay safe and healthy. 

Most major insurance providers help cover the cost of treatment

Find out right now if your health insurance benefits can be used to cover substance use treatment at Promises Behavioral Health treatment centers.

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

Comprehensive, evidence-based addiction treatment centers with locations nationwide

Our effective, client-centered treatment is available no matter where you live. Our treatment centers across the country deliver specialized programs to help you achieve lifelong sobriety.

Promises Behavioral Health

Mental Health Treatment & Drug Rehab Centers

Our various locations throughout the country provide essential mental health and addiction treatment to fit the needs of each client. Promise Behavioral Health offers unique yet effective experiences for those undergoing mental health or addiction treatment. Each location is fully accredited and staffed with a knowledgeable, trained, and compassionate staff.

 see our locations 

 

 The Ranch TN 

 Nunnelly, Tennessee 

 The Ranch PA 

 Wrightsville, Pennsylvania 

 Promises Brazos Valley 

 College Station, Texas 

 The Right Step Houston 

 Houston, Texas 

 Washburn House 

 Worcester, Massachusetts 

 Promises Dallas 

Dallas, Texas

 Promises Atlanta 

 Atlanta, Georgia 

 View all Treatment Centers 

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

I need help with substance use for:

 Myself 

Asking for help is a huge accomplishment. We’re here to support individuals through all stages of their recovery from drug and alcohol addiction.

 A loved one 

Seeing a loved one struggle with the effects of addiction is painful, but you can help them by helping them access effective, compassionate treatment.

 A client 

You care deeply about helping your clients get the help they deserve. We offer evidence-based substance use disorder treatments and are committed to open, transparent communication with referring professionals.

Recovery is lifelong—and so is our commitment to yours.

We offer a lifelong support system for individuals wherever they’re at in their recovery.

 Starting and during treatment 

At Promises Behavioral Health, we support patients even before they join us. Our entire admissions process is designed to get to know you as a person and to reduce the feeling of being overwhelmed. 

 Aftercare and alumni groups 

Our extensive aftercare and alumni groups network connects you with others living in sobriety with alumni events, Facebook groups, and other forms of support to keep you focused on long-term recovery.

 

 The greatest form of courage is to ask for help 

No matter where you’re at on your journey to recovery, we’re here to help you. 

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

Social

 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 Open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week 

103 Powell Court

Suite 100

Brentwood, TN 37027

<p class="has-text-align-left has-white-color has-text-color">Start your life in recovery with compassionate, effective treatment at Promises Behavioral Health</p>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-horizontal is-content-justification-left is-layout-flex wp-container-core-buttons-is-layout-20be11b6 wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">

<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color" id="h-there-is-a-better-future-in-front-of-you-and-we-re-here-to-help-you-discover-it">There is a better future in front of you—and we’re here to help you discover it.</h2>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color">We help patients recover their lives after substance use disorder at our nationwide family of treatment centers.</p>



<div style="height:6px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>
</div>
</div></section>

<div class="wp-block-uagb-advanced-heading uagb-block-93819499"><h2 class="uagb-heading-text">About Promises Behavioral Health</h2><div class="uagb-separator"></div><p class="uagb-desc-text">With its headquarters in Brentwood TN, Promises Behavioral Health is a family of centers nationwide ready to help you achieve recovery. Our highly trained staff throughout our drug rehab centers work to fill in the gaps of treatment. By providing unique options in healing environments, Promises Behavioral Health addiction treatment changes the way we approach recovery. Whether you’re looking for treatment for yourself or for a loved one, our team is ready to help every step of the way.</p></div>

<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-4bc16e6f"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color" id="h-it-doesn-t-matter-what-s-happened-up-to-this-point-there-is-a-path-to-recovery-for-you">It doesn’t matter what’s happened up to this point: there is a path to recovery for you</h2>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-horizontal is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-buttons-is-layout-03627597 wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-button"><a class="wp-block-button__link has-background wp-element-button" href="tel:(888) 483-7451" style="background-color:#419b05" data-wpel-link="internal">Call our 24/7 hotline</a></div>
</div>
</div>
</div></section>



<section class="wp-block-uagb-columns uagb-columns__wrap uagb-columns__background-none uagb-columns__stack-mobile uagb-columns__valign- uagb-columns__gap-10 align uagb-block-49de3545 uagb-columns__columns-2 uagb-columns__max_width-theme"><div class="uagb-columns__overlay"></div><div class="uagb-columns__inner-wrap uagb-columns__columns-2">
<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-cc8853a3"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<p>Addiction treatment means making big changes in your life. But you don’t have to make those changes all alone.</p>



<p>Promises Behavioral Health treatment centers provide comprehensive, effective treatment services that support you throughout your entire path to recovery:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong><em>Addiction treatment that works. </em></strong>Our model for treatment is based on the most current evidence-based practices for substance use treatment and co-occurring diagnoses</li>



<li><strong><em>Support for doing the work of recovery.</em> </strong>Patients have the opportunity to start recovery and healing in safe, judgment-free environments where they are supported by industry-leading professionals and empathetic staff</li>
</ul>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-428d43da"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<figure class="wp-block-image aligncenter size-full"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="430" height="376" src="https://www.promisesbehavioralhealth.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/how-does-psychodynamic-therapy-work-2.jpg" alt="how-does-psychodynamic-therapy-work" class="wp-image-7321" srcset="https://www.promises.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/how-does-psychodynamic-therapy-work-2.jpg 430w, https://www.promises.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/how-does-psychodynamic-therapy-work-2-300x262.jpg 300w" sizes="(max-width: 430px) 100vw, 430px" /></figure>
</div>
</div></section>



<div style="height:30px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>



<section class="wp-block-uagb-columns uagb-columns__wrap uagb-columns__background-color uagb-columns__stack-mobile uagb-columns__valign- uagb-columns__gap-10 alignfull uagb-block-f81b7831 uagb-columns__columns-1 uagb-columns__max_width-theme"><div class="uagb-columns__overlay"></div><div class="uagb-columns__inner-wrap uagb-columns__columns-1">
<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-80a4f0ec"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color" id="h-an-approach-to-recovery-that-s-rooted-in-compassion-and-hope">An approach to recovery that’s rooted in compassion and hope</h2>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color">Your story is important. Your recovery is important. This is the foundation of our relationship with our clients. </p>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color">We care about your challenges and helping you overcome them.</p>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-horizontal is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-buttons-is-layout-03627597 wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-button"><a class="wp-block-button__link has-background wp-element-button" href="tel:(888) 483-7451" style="background-color:#419b05" data-wpel-link="internal">Call our 24/7 hotline</a></div>
</div>
</div>
</div></section>



<section class="wp-block-uagb-columns uagb-columns__wrap uagb-columns__background-none uagb-columns__stack-mobile uagb-columns__valign- uagb-columns__gap-10 align uagb-block-d124f655 uagb-columns__columns-2 uagb-columns__max_width-theme"><div class="uagb-columns__overlay"></div><div class="uagb-columns__inner-wrap uagb-columns__columns-2">
<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-7d167c8b"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<figure class="wp-block-image aligncenter size-large"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="1024" height="684" src="https://www.promisesbehavioralhealth.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/dangerous-prescription-medication-1024x684.jpeg" alt="a woman talks to her doctor about dangerous prescription medications" class="wp-image-5894" srcset="https://www.promises.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/dangerous-prescription-medication-1024x684.jpeg 1024w, https://www.promises.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/dangerous-prescription-medication-300x200.jpeg 300w, https://www.promises.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/dangerous-prescription-medication-768x513.jpeg 768w, https://www.promises.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/02/dangerous-prescription-medication.jpeg 1200w" sizes="(max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px" /></figure>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-1676a0d3"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<p>Our intake process is based on our client-first philosophy. From your very first phone call with us, we’re here to help you break down the barriers to treatment.</p>



<p>Start your recovery with:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>A compassionate, nonjudgmental intake process to determine the right treatment schedule for you</li>



<li>A no-hassle insurance coverage verification process</li>



<li>Quick access to treatment, allowing you to start treatment without unnecessary delays or frustrations</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div></section>



<section class="wp-block-uagb-columns uagb-columns__wrap uagb-columns__background-none uagb-columns__stack-mobile uagb-columns__valign- uagb-columns__gap-10 align uagb-block-f66d08b9 uagb-columns__columns-2 uagb-columns__max_width-theme"><div class="uagb-columns__overlay"></div><div class="uagb-columns__inner-wrap uagb-columns__columns-2">
<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-851e3e2d"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<p>Recovery is too precious to risk with unproven methods or anything less than best-in-class professionals.</p>



<p>Our experienced professionals are trained in current, evidence-based therapeutic methods:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Trauma-informed care </li>



<li>Dual diagnosis treatment </li>



<li>Recovery and relapse prevention</li>



<li>Nutrition education</li>



<li>Medication-assisted treatment</li>
</ul>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-76cd0c11"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<figure class="wp-block-image size-large"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="1024" height="683" src="https://www.promisesbehavioralhealth.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/omar-lopez-auEe5lKHZCw-unsplash-1024x683.jpg" alt="" class="wp-image-6447" srcset="https://www.promises.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/omar-lopez-auEe5lKHZCw-unsplash-1024x683.jpg 1024w, https://www.promises.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/omar-lopez-auEe5lKHZCw-unsplash-300x200.jpg 300w, https://www.promises.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/omar-lopez-auEe5lKHZCw-unsplash-768x512.jpg 768w, https://www.promises.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/omar-lopez-auEe5lKHZCw-unsplash-1536x1024.jpg 1536w, https://www.promises.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/omar-lopez-auEe5lKHZCw-unsplash-2048x1365.jpg 2048w" sizes="(max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px" /></figure>
</div>
</div></section>



<section class="wp-block-uagb-columns uagb-columns__wrap uagb-columns__background-color uagb-columns__stack-mobile uagb-columns__valign- uagb-columns__gap-10 alignfull uagb-block-90bb6f99 uagb-columns__columns-1 uagb-columns__max_width-theme"><div class="uagb-columns__overlay"></div><div class="uagb-columns__inner-wrap uagb-columns__columns-1">
<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-1e5c13c4"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color" id="h-the-addiction-help-you-need-is-ready-for-you">The addiction help you need is ready for you</h2>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-horizontal is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-buttons-is-layout-03627597 wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-button"><a class="wp-block-button__link has-background wp-element-button" href="tel:(888) 483-7451" style="background-color:#419b05" data-wpel-link="internal">Call our 24/7 hotline</a></div>
</div>
</div>
</div></section>



<section class="wp-block-uagb-columns uagb-columns__wrap uagb-columns__background-none uagb-columns__stack-mobile uagb-columns__valign- uagb-columns__gap-10 align uagb-block-9e55449e uagb-columns__columns-2 uagb-columns__max_width-theme"><div class="uagb-columns__overlay"></div><div class="uagb-columns__inner-wrap uagb-columns__columns-2">
<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-f8ec7edb"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<div class="wp-block-uagb-advanced-heading uagb-block-1681fb93"><h2 class="uagb-heading-text"><strong>Medical detox</strong></h2><div class="uagb-separator"></div><p class="uagb-desc-text">Medical detox provides 24-hour medical monitoring for patients withdrawing from drug and alcohol use. </p></div>



<p class="has-text-align-center">We focus on ensuring your safety and comfort until you’re mentally stabilized and ready to participate in treatment.</p>
</div>

<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-00a124d9"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="h-recovery-is-lifelong-and-so-is-our-commitment-to-yours">Recovery is lifelong—and so is our commitment to yours.</h2>



<p>We offer a lifelong support system for individuals wherever they’re at in their recovery.</p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading"><a href="/rehab-admissions-process/" data-wpel-link="internal">Starting and during treatment</a></h3>



<p>At Promises Behavioral Health, we support patients even before they join us. Our entire admissions process is designed to get to know you as a person and to reduce the feeling of being overwhelmed. </p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading"><a href="/addiction-treatment-center-programs/alumni-program/" data-wpel-link="internal">Aftercare and alumni groups</a></h3>



<p class="has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color">Our extensive aftercare and alumni groups network connects you with others living in sobriety with alumni events, Facebook groups, and other forms of support to keep you focused on long-term recovery.</p>
</div>
</div></section>

<p class="has-text-align-center has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color">No matter where you’re at on your journey to recovery, we’re here to help you. </p>

			<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

Recovery Begins with a Promise

Start your life in recovery with compassionate, effective treatment at Promises Behavioral Health

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

 Verify your insurance 

There is a better future in front of you—and we’re here to help you discover it.

We help patients recover their lives after substance use disorder at our nationwide family of treatment centers.

 Promises Behavioral Health is fully accredited and certified 

 

 

 

 

About Promises Behavioral Health

With its headquarters in Brentwood TN, Promises Behavioral Health is a family of centers nationwide ready to help you achieve recovery. Our highly trained staff throughout our drug rehab centers work to fill in the gaps of treatment. By providing unique options in healing environments, Promises Behavioral Health addiction treatment changes the way we approach recovery. Whether you’re looking for treatment for yourself or for a loved one, our team is ready to help every step of the way.

 learn more about us 

 

It doesn’t matter what’s happened up to this point: there is a path to recovery for you

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

Addiction treatment means making big changes in your life. But you don’t have to make those changes all alone.

Promises Behavioral Health treatment centers provide comprehensive, effective treatment services that support you throughout your entire path to recovery:

 

 Addiction treatment that works. Our model for treatment is based on the most current evidence-based practices for substance use treatment and co-occurring diagnoses

 Support for doing the work of recovery. Patients have the opportunity to start recovery and healing in safe, judgment-free environments where they are supported by industry-leading professionals and empathetic staff

 

 

An approach to recovery that’s rooted in compassion and hope

Your story is important. Your recovery is important. This is the foundation of our relationship with our clients. 

We care about your challenges and helping you overcome them.

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

 

Our intake process is based on our client-first philosophy. From your very first phone call with us, we’re here to help you break down the barriers to treatment.

Start your recovery with:

 

A compassionate, nonjudgmental intake process to determine the right treatment schedule for you

A no-hassle insurance coverage verification process

Quick access to treatment, allowing you to start treatment without unnecessary delays or frustrations

 

Recovery is too precious to risk with unproven methods or anything less than best-in-class professionals.

Our experienced professionals are trained in current, evidence-based therapeutic methods:

 

Trauma-informed care 

Dual diagnosis treatment 

Recovery and relapse prevention

Nutrition education

Medication-assisted treatment

 

 

The addiction help you need is ready for you

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

 Medical detox 

Medical detox provides 24-hour medical monitoring for patients withdrawing from drug and alcohol use. 

We focus on ensuring your safety and comfort until you’re mentally stabilized and ready to participate in treatment.

 Residential treatment 

Now is your opportunity to dedicate your whole self towards healing. 

Promises Behavioral Health offers modern facilities with all the amenities you need to feel at home while you do the hard work of your recovery.

 Outpatient treatment 

A flexible approach to treating your drug and alcohol addiction. With our outpatient programs, you don’t have to interrupt your life to get your life back. 

Options include partial hospitalization programs, intensive outpatient programs, and continuing care groups.

 Alumni support 

Once you’ve completed your treatment program, we support you through our extensive network of alumni groups. 

Our alumni groups reinforce recovery skills, provide social and emotional support, and help advocate for addiction awareness.

Mental Health & Addiction Treatment Programs

at Promises Behavioral Health

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

 Personality Disorder 

With a residential treatment center for dependent personality disorder, many people with personality disorders can manage their symptoms.

 Anxiety Treatment 

 Our inpatient anxiety treatment centers help people overcome the effects of anxiety disorders. 

 Trauma & PTSD Treatment 

 Residential PTSD programs offer a private, secluded place where the emphasis is on treatment. 

 Non 12 Step Programs 

 Non 12 step options offer effective treatment for those who feel a 12 step approach isn’t for them. 

 Mood Disorders 

 Sex Addiction Treatment 

 Individualized treatment for sex addiction is crucial to helping clients stay safe and healthy. 

Most major insurance providers help cover the cost of treatment

Find out right now if your health insurance benefits can be used to cover substance use treatment at Promises Behavioral Health treatment centers.

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

Comprehensive, evidence-based addiction treatment centers with locations nationwide

Our effective, client-centered treatment is available no matter where you live. Our treatment centers across the country deliver specialized programs to help you achieve lifelong sobriety.

Promises Behavioral Health

Mental Health Treatment & Drug Rehab Centers

Our various locations throughout the country provide essential mental health and addiction treatment to fit the needs of each client. Promise Behavioral Health offers unique yet effective experiences for those undergoing mental health or addiction treatment. Each location is fully accredited and staffed with a knowledgeable, trained, and compassionate staff.

 see our locations 

 

 The Ranch TN 

 Nunnelly, Tennessee 

 The Ranch PA 

 Wrightsville, Pennsylvania 

 Promises Brazos Valley 

 College Station, Texas 

 The Right Step Houston 

 Houston, Texas 

 Washburn House 

 Worcester, Massachusetts 

 Promises Dallas 

Dallas, Texas

 Promises Atlanta 

 Atlanta, Georgia 

 View all Treatment Centers 

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

I need help with substance use for:

 Myself 

Asking for help is a huge accomplishment. We’re here to support individuals through all stages of their recovery from drug and alcohol addiction.

 A loved one 

Seeing a loved one struggle with the effects of addiction is painful, but you can help them by helping them access effective, compassionate treatment.

 A client 

You care deeply about helping your clients get the help they deserve. We offer evidence-based substance use disorder treatments and are committed to open, transparent communication with referring professionals.

Recovery is lifelong—and so is our commitment to yours.

We offer a lifelong support system for individuals wherever they’re at in their recovery.

 Starting and during treatment 

At Promises Behavioral Health, we support patients even before they join us. Our entire admissions process is designed to get to know you as a person and to reduce the feeling of being overwhelmed. 

 Aftercare and alumni groups 

Our extensive aftercare and alumni groups network connects you with others living in sobriety with alumni events, Facebook groups, and other forms of support to keep you focused on long-term recovery.

 

 The greatest form of courage is to ask for help 

No matter where you’re at on your journey to recovery, we’re here to help you. 

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

Social

 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 Open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week

Brentwood, TN 37027

	#notify-bar .alert-wrapper{
		padding:5px;
	}
	#close{
		float: right;
		padding-right: 40px;
	}
	#close:hover {
		cursor: pointer;
	}
	#notify-bar .icon-wrap{
		height: 25px;
		display: inline-flex;
		width: 20px;
		margin: 5px 20px 0 0;
	}
	.notificationParagraph{
		margin-top: 16px;
		margin-bottom: 16px;
	}
	.notificationParagraph a {
		color: white;
		text-decoration: underline;
	}
	.notificationParagraph a:hover {
		color: white;
		text-decoration: underline;
	}
	.notificationParagraph a:active {
		color: white;
		text-decoration: underline;
	}
	.notificationParagraph a:focus {
		color: white;
		text-decoration: underline;
	}
	#notify-bar .notification-title{
		display: inline-flex;
		color: white;
		vertical-align: top;
		margin-top: 5px;
	}
	#notify-bar .icon-wrap svg{
		width: inherit;
		height: inherit;
		fill: white;
		padding-top:5px;
	}
	#notify-bar{
		text-align: center;
		background: #34566B;
		color: white;
	}
	@media only screen and (max-width: 600px) {
			#notify-bar .icon-wrap{
				float:left;
				margin: 15px 20px 0 15px;
			}
			#notify-bar .notification-title{
				display: block;
				margin-top: 5px;
				left: 50px;
				top: -30px;
				margin-right: 30px;
			}
	}

</style>

<p class="has-text-align-left has-white-color has-text-color">Start your life in recovery with compassionate, effective treatment at Promises Behavioral Health</p>

<p class="has-text-align-center has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color">We help patients recover their lives after substance use disorder at our nationwide family of treatment centers.</p>

<ul class="wp-block-list">

</ul>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="h-recovery-is-lifelong-and-so-is-our-commitment-to-yours">Recovery is lifelong—and so is our commitment to yours.</h2>



<p>We offer a lifelong support system for individuals wherever they’re at in their recovery.</p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading"><a href="/rehab-admissions-process/" data-wpel-link="internal">Starting and during treatment</a></h3>



<p>At Promises Behavioral Health, we support patients even before they join us. Our entire admissions process is designed to get to know you as a person and to reduce the feeling of being overwhelmed. </p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading"><a href="/addiction-treatment-center-programs/alumni-program/" data-wpel-link="internal">Aftercare and alumni groups</a></h3>



<p class="has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color">Our extensive aftercare and alumni groups network connects you with others living in sobriety with alumni events, Facebook groups, and other forms of support to keep you focused on long-term recovery.</p>
</div>
</div></section>

<p class="has-text-align-center has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color">No matter where you’re at on your journey to recovery, we’re here to help you. </p>

			<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

Recovery Begins with a Promise

Start your life in recovery with compassionate, effective treatment at Promises Behavioral Health

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

 Verify your insurance 

There is a better future in front of you—and we’re here to help you discover it.

We help patients recover their lives after substance use disorder at our nationwide family of treatment centers.

 Promises Behavioral Health is fully accredited and certified 

 

 

 

 

About Promises Behavioral Health

With its headquarters in Brentwood TN, Promises Behavioral Health is a family of centers nationwide ready to help you achieve recovery. Our highly trained staff throughout our drug rehab centers work to fill in the gaps of treatment. By providing unique options in healing environments, Promises Behavioral Health addiction treatment changes the way we approach recovery. Whether you’re looking for treatment for yourself or for a loved one, our team is ready to help every step of the way.

 learn more about us 

 

It doesn’t matter what’s happened up to this point: there is a path to recovery for you

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

Addiction treatment means making big changes in your life. But you don’t have to make those changes all alone.

Promises Behavioral Health treatment centers provide comprehensive, effective treatment services that support you throughout your entire path to recovery:

 

 Addiction treatment that works. Our model for treatment is based on the most current evidence-based practices for substance use treatment and co-occurring diagnoses

 Support for doing the work of recovery. Patients have the opportunity to start recovery and healing in safe, judgment-free environments where they are supported by industry-leading professionals and empathetic staff

 

 

An approach to recovery that’s rooted in compassion and hope

Your story is important. Your recovery is important. This is the foundation of our relationship with our clients. 

We care about your challenges and helping you overcome them.

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

 

Our intake process is based on our client-first philosophy. From your very first phone call with us, we’re here to help you break down the barriers to treatment.

Start your recovery with:

 

A compassionate, nonjudgmental intake process to determine the right treatment schedule for you

A no-hassle insurance coverage verification process

Quick access to treatment, allowing you to start treatment without unnecessary delays or frustrations

 

Recovery is too precious to risk with unproven methods or anything less than best-in-class professionals.

Our experienced professionals are trained in current, evidence-based therapeutic methods:

 

Trauma-informed care 

Dual diagnosis treatment 

Recovery and relapse prevention

Nutrition education

Medication-assisted treatment

 

 

The addiction help you need is ready for you

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

 Medical detox 

Medical detox provides 24-hour medical monitoring for patients withdrawing from drug and alcohol use. 

We focus on ensuring your safety and comfort until you’re mentally stabilized and ready to participate in treatment.

 Residential treatment 

Now is your opportunity to dedicate your whole self towards healing. 

Promises Behavioral Health offers modern facilities with all the amenities you need to feel at home while you do the hard work of your recovery.

 Outpatient treatment 

A flexible approach to treating your drug and alcohol addiction. With our outpatient programs, you don’t have to interrupt your life to get your life back. 

Options include partial hospitalization programs, intensive outpatient programs, and continuing care groups.

 Alumni support 

Once you’ve completed your treatment program, we support you through our extensive network of alumni groups. 

Our alumni groups reinforce recovery skills, provide social and emotional support, and help advocate for addiction awareness.

Mental Health & Addiction Treatment Programs

at Promises Behavioral Health

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

 Personality Disorder 

With a residential treatment center for dependent personality disorder, many people with personality disorders can manage their symptoms.

 Anxiety Treatment 

 Our inpatient anxiety treatment centers help people overcome the effects of anxiety disorders. 

 Trauma & PTSD Treatment 

 Residential PTSD programs offer a private, secluded place where the emphasis is on treatment. 

 Non 12 Step Programs 

 Non 12 step options offer effective treatment for those who feel a 12 step approach isn’t for them. 

 Mood Disorders 

 Sex Addiction Treatment 

 Individualized treatment for sex addiction is crucial to helping clients stay safe and healthy. 

Most major insurance providers help cover the cost of treatment

Find out right now if your health insurance benefits can be used to cover substance use treatment at Promises Behavioral Health treatment centers.

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

Comprehensive, evidence-based addiction treatment centers with locations nationwide

Our effective, client-centered treatment is available no matter where you live. Our treatment centers across the country deliver specialized programs to help you achieve lifelong sobriety.

Promises Behavioral Health

Mental Health Treatment & Drug Rehab Centers

Our various locations throughout the country provide essential mental health and addiction treatment to fit the needs of each client. Promise Behavioral Health offers unique yet effective experiences for those undergoing mental health or addiction treatment. Each location is fully accredited and staffed with a knowledgeable, trained, and compassionate staff.

 see our locations 

 

 The Ranch TN 

 Nunnelly, Tennessee 

 The Ranch PA 

 Wrightsville, Pennsylvania 

 Promises Brazos Valley 

 College Station, Texas 

 The Right Step Houston 

 Houston, Texas 

 Washburn House 

 Worcester, Massachusetts 

 Promises Dallas 

Dallas, Texas

 Promises Atlanta 

 Atlanta, Georgia 

 View all Treatment Centers 

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

I need help with substance use for:

 Myself 

Asking for help is a huge accomplishment. We’re here to support individuals through all stages of their recovery from drug and alcohol addiction.

 A loved one 

Seeing a loved one struggle with the effects of addiction is painful, but you can help them by helping them access effective, compassionate treatment.

 A client 

You care deeply about helping your clients get the help they deserve. We offer evidence-based substance use disorder treatments and are committed to open, transparent communication with referring professionals.

Recovery is lifelong—and so is our commitment to yours.

We offer a lifelong support system for individuals wherever they’re at in their recovery.

 Starting and during treatment 

At Promises Behavioral Health, we support patients even before they join us. Our entire admissions process is designed to get to know you as a person and to reduce the feeling of being overwhelmed. 

 Aftercare and alumni groups 

Our extensive aftercare and alumni groups network connects you with others living in sobriety with alumni events, Facebook groups, and other forms of support to keep you focused on long-term recovery.

 

 The greatest form of courage is to ask for help 

No matter where you’re at on your journey to recovery, we’re here to help you. 

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

Social

 
 

 

 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 Open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week 

103 Powell Court

Brentwood, TN 37027

		color: white;

	}

		color: white;
		text-decoration: underline;
	}
	.notificationParagraph a:focus {
		color: white;
		text-decoration: underline;
	}
	#notify-bar .notification-title{
		display: inline-flex;
		color: white;
		vertical-align: top;
		margin-top: 5px;
	}
	#notify-bar .icon-wrap svg{
		width: inherit;
		height: inherit;
		fill: white;
		padding-top:5px;
	}
	#notify-bar{
		text-align: center;

		color: white;

<p class="has-text-align-left has-white-color has-text-color">Start your life in recovery with compassionate, effective treatment at Promises Behavioral Health</p>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color" id="h-there-is-a-better-future-in-front-of-you-and-we-re-here-to-help-you-discover-it">There is a better future in front of you—and we’re here to help you discover it.</h2>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color">We help patients recover their lives after substance use disorder at our nationwide family of treatment centers.</p>

<div class="wp-block-uagb-advanced-heading uagb-block-93819499"><h2 class="uagb-heading-text">About Promises Behavioral Health</h2><div class="uagb-separator"></div><p class="uagb-desc-text">With its headquarters in Brentwood TN, Promises Behavioral Health is a family of centers nationwide ready to help you achieve recovery. Our highly trained staff throughout our drug rehab centers work to fill in the gaps of treatment. By providing unique options in healing environments, Promises Behavioral Health addiction treatment changes the way we approach recovery. Whether you’re looking for treatment for yourself or for a loved one, our team is ready to help every step of the way.</p></div>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color" id="h-it-doesn-t-matter-what-s-happened-up-to-this-point-there-is-a-path-to-recovery-for-you">It doesn’t matter what’s happened up to this point: there is a path to recovery for you</h2>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-horizontal is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-buttons-is-layout-03627597 wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-button"><a class="wp-block-button__link has-background wp-element-button" href="tel:(888) 483-7451" style="background-color:#419b05" data-wpel-link="internal">Call our 24/7 hotline</a></div>
</div>
</div>
</div></section>



<section class="wp-block-uagb-columns uagb-columns__wrap uagb-columns__background-none uagb-columns__stack-mobile uagb-columns__valign- uagb-columns__gap-10 align uagb-block-49de3545 uagb-columns__columns-2 uagb-columns__max_width-theme"><div class="uagb-columns__overlay"></div><div class="uagb-columns__inner-wrap uagb-columns__columns-2">
<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-cc8853a3"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<p>Addiction treatment means making big changes in your life. But you don’t have to make those changes all alone.</p>



<p>Promises Behavioral Health treatment centers provide comprehensive, effective treatment services that support you throughout your entire path to recovery:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong><em>Addiction treatment that works. </em></strong>Our model for treatment is based on the most current evidence-based practices for substance use treatment and co-occurring diagnoses</li>



<li><strong><em>Support for doing the work of recovery.</em> </strong>Patients have the opportunity to start recovery and healing in safe, judgment-free environments where they are supported by industry-leading professionals and empathetic staff</li>
</ul>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-428d43da"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<figure class="wp-block-image aligncenter size-full"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="430" height="376" src="https://www.promisesbehavioralhealth.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/how-does-psychodynamic-therapy-work-2.jpg" alt="how-does-psychodynamic-therapy-work" class="wp-image-7321" srcset="https://www.promises.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/how-does-psychodynamic-therapy-work-2.jpg 430w, https://www.promises.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/how-does-psychodynamic-therapy-work-2-300x262.jpg 300w" sizes="(max-width: 430px) 100vw, 430px" /></figure>
</div>
</div></section>



<div style="height:30px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>



<section class="wp-block-uagb-columns uagb-columns__wrap uagb-columns__background-color uagb-columns__stack-mobile uagb-columns__valign- uagb-columns__gap-10 alignfull uagb-block-f81b7831 uagb-columns__columns-1 uagb-columns__max_width-theme"><div class="uagb-columns__overlay"></div><div class="uagb-columns__inner-wrap uagb-columns__columns-1">
<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-80a4f0ec"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color" id="h-an-approach-to-recovery-that-s-rooted-in-compassion-and-hope">An approach to recovery that’s rooted in compassion and hope</h2>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color">Your story is important. Your recovery is important. This is the foundation of our relationship with our clients. </p>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color">We care about your challenges and helping you overcome them.</p>



<div class="wp-block-buttons is-horizontal is-content-justification-center is-layout-flex wp-container-core-buttons-is-layout-03627597 wp-block-buttons-is-layout-flex">

</div>
</div>
</div></section>

<div class="wp-block-uagb-advanced-heading uagb-block-ad61ec01"><h2 class="uagb-heading-text"><a href="https://www.promises.com/rehab-admissions-process/addiction-treatment-for-yourself/" data-wpel-link="internal">Myself</a></h2><div class="uagb-separator"></div><p class="uagb-desc-text">Asking for help is a huge accomplishment. We’re here to support individuals through all stages of their recovery from drug and alcohol addiction.</p></div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-443a73d0"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<div class="wp-block-uagb-advanced-heading uagb-block-b03445b1"><h2 class="uagb-heading-text"><a href="https://www.promises.com/rehab-admissions-process/addiction-treatment-for-a-loved-one/" data-wpel-link="internal">A loved one</a></h2><div class="uagb-separator"></div><p class="uagb-desc-text">Seeing a loved one struggle with the effects of addiction is painful, but you can help them by helping them access effective, compassionate treatment.</p></div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-c66cf722"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<div class="wp-block-uagb-advanced-heading uagb-block-254baed9"><h2 class="uagb-heading-text"><a href="https://pbhstagingweb.wpengine.com/rehab-admissions-process/addiction-treatment-for-a-client/" target="_blank" rel="noopener follow external noreferrer" data-wpel-link="external">A client</a></h2><div class="uagb-separator"></div><p class="uagb-desc-text">You care deeply about helping your clients get the help they deserve. We offer evidence-based substance use disorder treatments and are committed to open, transparent communication with referring professionals.</p></div>
</div>
</div></section>



<div style="height:30px" aria-hidden="true" class="wp-block-spacer"></div>



<section class="wp-block-uagb-columns uagb-columns__wrap uagb-columns__background-none uagb-columns__stack-mobile uagb-columns__valign- uagb-columns__gap-10 alignfull uagb-block-9d2ade98 uagb-columns__columns-1 uagb-columns__max_width-theme section-recovery"><div class="uagb-columns__overlay"></div><div class="uagb-columns__inner-wrap uagb-columns__columns-1">
<div class="wp-block-uagb-column uagb-column__wrap uagb-column__background-undefined uagb-block-00a124d9"><div class="uagb-column__overlay"></div>
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" id="h-recovery-is-lifelong-and-so-is-our-commitment-to-yours">Recovery is lifelong—and so is our commitment to yours.</h2>



<p>We offer a lifelong support system for individuals wherever they’re at in their recovery.</p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading"><a href="/rehab-admissions-process/" data-wpel-link="internal">Starting and during treatment</a></h3>



<p>At Promises Behavioral Health, we support patients even before they join us. Our entire admissions process is designed to get to know you as a person and to reduce the feeling of being overwhelmed. </p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading"><a href="/addiction-treatment-center-programs/alumni-program/" data-wpel-link="internal">Aftercare and alumni groups</a></h3>



<p class="has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color">Our extensive aftercare and alumni groups network connects you with others living in sobriety with alumni events, Facebook groups, and other forms of support to keep you focused on long-term recovery.</p>
</div>
</div></section>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center has-white-color has-text-color" id="h-the-greatest-form-of-courage-is-to-ask-for-help"><em>The greatest form of courage is to ask for help</em></h2>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-ast-global-color-4-color has-text-color">No matter where you’re at on your journey to recovery, we’re here to help you. </p>

				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>

Recovery Begins with a Promise

Start your life in recovery with compassionate, effective treatment at Promises Behavioral Health

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

 Verify your insurance 

There is a better future in front of you—and we’re here to help you discover it.

We help patients recover their lives after substance use disorder at our nationwide family of treatment centers.

 Promises Behavioral Health is fully accredited and certified 

 

 

 

 

About Promises Behavioral Health

With its headquarters in Brentwood TN, Promises Behavioral Health is a family of centers nationwide ready to help you achieve recovery. Our highly trained staff throughout our drug rehab centers work to fill in the gaps of treatment. By providing unique options in healing environments, Promises Behavioral Health addiction treatment changes the way we approach recovery. Whether you’re looking for treatment for yourself or for a loved one, our team is ready to help every step of the way.

 learn more about us 

 

It doesn’t matter what’s happened up to this point: there is a path to recovery for you

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

Addiction treatment means making big changes in your life. But you don’t have to make those changes all alone.

Promises Behavioral Health treatment centers provide comprehensive, effective treatment services that support you throughout your entire path to recovery:

 

 Addiction treatment that works. Our model for treatment is based on the most current evidence-based practices for substance use treatment and co-occurring diagnoses

 Support for doing the work of recovery. Patients have the opportunity to start recovery and healing in safe, judgment-free environments where they are supported by industry-leading professionals and empathetic staff

 

 

An approach to recovery that’s rooted in compassion and hope

Your story is important. Your recovery is important. This is the foundation of our relationship with our clients. 

We care about your challenges and helping you overcome them.

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

 

Our intake process is based on our client-first philosophy. From your very first phone call with us, we’re here to help you break down the barriers to treatment.

Start your recovery with:

 

A compassionate, nonjudgmental intake process to determine the right treatment schedule for you

A no-hassle insurance coverage verification process

Quick access to treatment, allowing you to start treatment without unnecessary delays or frustrations

 

Recovery is too precious to risk with unproven methods or anything less than best-in-class professionals.

Our experienced professionals are trained in current, evidence-based therapeutic methods:

 

Trauma-informed care 

Dual diagnosis treatment 

Recovery and relapse prevention

Nutrition education

Medication-assisted treatment

 

 

The addiction help you need is ready for you

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

 Medical detox 

Medical detox provides 24-hour medical monitoring for patients withdrawing from drug and alcohol use. 

We focus on ensuring your safety and comfort until you’re mentally stabilized and ready to participate in treatment.

 Residential treatment 

Now is your opportunity to dedicate your whole self towards healing. 

Promises Behavioral Health offers modern facilities with all the amenities you need to feel at home while you do the hard work of your recovery.

 Outpatient treatment 

A flexible approach to treating your drug and alcohol addiction. With our outpatient programs, you don’t have to interrupt your life to get your life back. 

Options include partial hospitalization programs, intensive outpatient programs, and continuing care groups.

 Alumni support 

Once you’ve completed your treatment program, we support you through our extensive network of alumni groups. 

Our alumni groups reinforce recovery skills, provide social and emotional support, and help advocate for addiction awareness.

Mental Health & Addiction Treatment Programs

at Promises Behavioral Health

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

 Personality Disorder 

With a residential treatment center for dependent personality disorder, many people with personality disorders can manage their symptoms.

 Anxiety Treatment 

 Our inpatient anxiety treatment centers help people overcome the effects of anxiety disorders. 

 Trauma & PTSD Treatment 

 Residential PTSD programs offer a private, secluded place where the emphasis is on treatment.

 Call our 24/7 hotline 

Comprehensive, evidence-based addiction treatment centers with locations nationwide

Our effective, client-centered treatment is available no matter where you live. Our treatment centers across the country deliver specialized programs to help you achieve lifelong sobriety.

Promises Behavioral Health

Mental Health Treatment & Drug Rehab Centers

Our various locations throughout the country provide essential mental health and addiction treatment to fit the needs of each client. Promise Behavioral Health offers unique yet effective experiences for those undergoing mental health or addiction treatment. Each location is fully accredited and staffed with a knowledgeable, trained, and compassionate staff.

I need help with substance use for:

 Myself 

Asking for help is a huge accomplishment. We’re here to support individuals through all stages of their recovery from drug and alcohol addiction.

 A loved one 

Seeing a loved one struggle with the effects of addiction is painful, but you can help them by helping them access effective, compassionate treatment.

 A client 

You care deeply about helping your clients get the help they deserve. We offer evidence-based substance use disorder treatments and are committed to open, transparent communication with referring professionals.

Recovery is lifelong—and so is our commitment to yours.

We offer a lifelong support system for individuals wherever they’re at in their recovery.

 Starting and during treatment 

At Promises Behavioral Health, we support patients even before they join us. Our entire admissions process is designed to get to know you as a person and to reduce the feeling of being overwhelmed. 

 Aftercare and alumni groups 

Our extensive aftercare and alumni groups network connects you with others living in sobriety with alumni events, Facebook groups, and other forms of support to keep you focused on long-term recovery.

 

 The greatest form of courage is to ask for help 

No matter where you’re at on your journey to recovery, we’re here to help you.
